  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing secondary bonding jumper (system bonding jumper) on a Separately Derived System (SDS)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a properly sized system bonding jumper between the secondary neutral terminal and the equipment grounding conductor/enclosure in accordance with NEC 250.30"
  ],
  "rationale": "The transformer is installed as a Separately Derived System (SDS) but lacks the required system bonding jumper. Without this jumper, there is no low-impedance ground-fault path to trip the overcurrent protective device in the event of a secondary-side ground fault, creating a severe shock and fire hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 250.30",
    "NEC Article 450"
  ]
}
